author: kravetsone
abstract: AdminJS 7 on the Bun + Elysia + Drizzle ORM + S3 stack plus the broader ecosystem (`@adminjs/passwords`, `@adminjs/logger`, `@adminjs/import-export`, `@adminjs/leaflet`, `@adminjs/bundler`, `@adminjs/relations` premium note, `@adminjs/firebase-auth`, `@gugupy/adminjs-keycloak`, `@rulab/adminjs-components`). Covers `adminjs-elysia`'s `buildRouter` / `buildAuthenticatedRouter` (v0.1.4 cookie-name bug and ignored options), `adminjs-drizzle`'s snake_case + boolean-as-string quirks, `@adminjs/upload`'s `BaseProvider` contract (and why built-in AWS/GCP providers are broken under Elysia because the file is a Web API Blob, not formidable `{ path }`), Bun `S3Client` + `@aws-sdk/client-s3` provider templates, multi-upload-per-resource virtual-name collisions, production pre-bundling with `@adminjs/bundler` + `ADMIN_JS_SKIP_BUNDLE="true"` (string!), asset versioning, drag-drop reorder via `SortableListFeature`, EditorJS escape-hatch from buggy Tiptap, Keycloak/OIDC auth, the `buildFeature()` helper pattern for reusable feature factories, richtext link-button patch, ComponentLoader path resolution, React 18 pin, custom record/resource/bulk actions with before/after hooks, `DefaultAuthProvider` and JWT cookies, plus copy-paste templates and node scripts (`doctor.mjs`, `bundle-check.mjs`, `scaffold-resource.mjs`). Trigger on imports of `adminjs`, `adminjs-elysia`, `adminjs-drizzle`, `@adminjs/*`, `@rulab/adminjs-components`, `@gugupy/adminjs-keycloak`, or on any task involving AdminJS resource configuration, custom actions, S3-backed uploads, and Elysia integration.
